---
name: Custom issue template
about: Describe this issue template's purpose here.
title: WCAG [criterion] – [short issue description]
labels: bug, documentation, duplicate, help wanted, invalid, question, wontfix
assignees: leenabathUSHE

---

## WCAG Criterion

(e.g., 1.1.1 Non-text Content)

## Issue Summary

Brief description of the accessibility issue.

## Location

URL or page where issue occurs.

## Detection Method

* [ ] Automated (axe, Lighthouse, etc.)
* [ ] Manual testing

## Severity

* [ ] High
* [ ] Medium
* [ ] Low

## Description

Detailed explanation of the issue.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to page
2. Perform action
3. Observe issue

## Expected Behavior

What should happen if accessible.

## Actual Behavior

What currently happens.

## Evidence

(Screenshots, logs, or reports)

## Suggested Fix

(Optional but helpful)

## Related ACR Notes

(Optional: tie to ACR language)
